datasets.name: e3a8d490
queryLines:
WITH transaction_risk AS (
  SELECT
    *,

    -- Month (DATE for filtering & logic)
    date_trunc('month', transaction_date) AS metric_month,

    -- Month label (STRING for display / dropdown)
    cast(date_format(date_trunc('month', transaction_date), 'MMM yyyy') as string) AS metric_month_label,

    -- Quarter (DATE)
    date_trunc('quarter', transaction_date) AS metric_quarter,

    -- Quarter label (STRING)
    cast(concat('Q', quarter(transaction_date), ' ', year(transaction_date)) as string) AS metric_quarter_label

  FROM telecommunications.fraud_data.transaction_risk
)

SELECT * FROM transaction_risk;

datasets.name: 99313fb4
queryLines:
USE CATALOG `main`;
USE SCHEMA `default`;

SELECT 
  *, 
  CASE 
    WHEN fraud_score >= 70 AND fraud_score < 75 THEN '70-75'
    WHEN fraud_score >= 75 AND fraud_score < 80 THEN '75-80'
    WHEN fraud_score >= 80 AND fraud_score < 85 THEN '80-85'
    WHEN fraud_score >= 85 AND fraud_score < 90 THEN '85-90'
    WHEN fraud_score >= 90 AND fraud_score < 95 THEN '90-95'
    WHEN fraud_score >= 95 THEN '95+'
  END AS fraud_score_category
FROM telecommunications.fraud_data.transaction_risk

datasets.name: 656bb0ef
queryLines:
SELECT 
  assigned_analyst,
  transaction_state AS analyst_state,
  transaction_region AS analyst_region,
  SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'reviewed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewed_cases,
  SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'escalated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS escalated_cases,
  SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'pending_review' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_cases,
  COUNT(*) AS total_cases
FROM transaction_risk
WHERE fraud_score >= 70 AND fraud_score < 95
GROUP BY assigned_analyst, transaction_state, transaction_region
ORDER BY total_cases DESC

datasets.name: e39e7e67
queryLines:
WITH daily_cases AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(transaction_date) AS transaction_day,
    COUNT(*) AS daily_case_count
  FROM telecommunications.fraud_data.transaction_risk
  WHERE fraud_score BETWEEN 70 AND 95
  GROUP BY DATE(transaction_date)
),

-- Use only the last 60 days to train (tune this: 30, 60, 90…)
recent_daily_cases AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM daily_cases
  WHERE transaction_day >= DATEADD(DAY, -60, (SELECT MAX(transaction_day) FROM daily_cases))
),

forecast AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM ai_forecast(
    observed   => TABLE(recent_daily_cases),
    horizon    => (SELECT MAX(transaction_day) + INTERVAL 30 DAYS FROM daily_cases),
    time_col   => 'transaction_day',
    value_col  => 'daily_case_count'
  )
)
SELECT
  d.transaction_day,
  d.daily_case_count,
  f.daily_case_count_forecast   AS predicted_case_count,
  f.daily_case_count_lower      AS predicted_case_count_lower,
  f.daily_case_count_upper      AS predicted_case_count_upper
FROM daily_cases d
LEFT JOIN forecast f
  ON d.transaction_day = f.transaction_day

UNION ALL

SELECT
  f.transaction_day,
  NULL AS daily_case_count,
  f.daily_case_count_forecast   AS predicted_case_count,
  f.daily_case_count_lower      AS predicted_case_count_lower,
  f.daily_case_count_upper      AS predicted_case_count_upper
FROM forecast f
WHERE f.transaction_day >
  (SELECT MAX(transaction_day) FROM daily_cases)
ORDER BY transaction_day;

datasets.name: 8d3ddaef
queryLines:
with monthly as (
    select
        date_trunc('month', transaction_date) as metric_month,
        date_format(date_trunc('month', transaction_date), 'MMM yyyy') as metric_month_label,
        transaction_state,
        transaction_region,

        count_if(risk_status_engine = 'blocked') as autoblocked_cases,

        sum(
            case
                when risk_status_engine = 'blocked'
                then case_exposure_usd
                else 0
            end
        ) as saved_by_autoblocked_cases,

        count_if(is_fp = true) as incorrectly_blocked_cases,

        sum(
            case
                when is_fp = true then case_exposure_usd
                else 0
            end
        ) as lost_by_incorrectly_blocked_cases,

        count_if(is_fn = true) as missed_fraud_cases,

        sum(
            case
                when is_fn = true then case_exposure_usd
                else 0
            end
        ) as lost_by_missed_fraud_cases

    from telecommunications.fraud_data.transaction_risk
    group by 1, 2, 3, 4
)

select
    metric_month,
    metric_month_label,
    transaction_state,
    transaction_region,

    autoblocked_cases,
    lag(autoblocked_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_month
    ) as autoblocked_cases_last_month,

    saved_by_autoblocked_cases,
    lag(saved_by_autoblocked_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_month
    ) as saved_by_autoblocked_cases_last_month,

    incorrectly_blocked_cases,
    lag(incorrectly_blocked_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_month
    ) as incorrectly_blocked_cases_last_month,

    lost_by_incorrectly_blocked_cases,
    lag(lost_by_incorrectly_blocked_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_month
    ) as lost_by_incorrectly_blocked_cases_last_month,

    missed_fraud_cases,
    lag(missed_fraud_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_month
    ) as missed_fraud_cases_last_month,

    lost_by_missed_fraud_cases,
    lag(lost_by_missed_fraud_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_month
    ) as lost_by_missed_fraud_cases_last_month

from monthly
order by transaction_state, transaction_region, metric_month;

datasets.name: 467e8ed4
datasets.displayName: Quarterly Fraud Risk Analysis and Impact Summary
queryLines:
with quarterly as (
    select
        date_trunc('quarter', transaction_date) as metric_quarter,
        concat('Q', quarter(transaction_date), ' ', year(transaction_date)) as metric_quarter_label,
        transaction_state,
        transaction_region,

        count_if(risk_status_engine = 'blocked') as autoblocked_cases,

        sum(
            case
                when risk_status_engine = 'blocked'
                then case_exposure_usd
                else 0
            end
        ) as saved_by_autoblocked_cases,

        count_if(is_fp = true) as incorrectly_blocked_cases,

        sum(
            case
                when is_fp = true then case_exposure_usd
                else 0
            end
        ) as lost_by_incorrectly_blocked_cases,

        count_if(is_fn = true) as missed_fraud_cases,

        sum(
            case
                when is_fn = true then case_exposure_usd
                else 0
            end
        ) as lost_by_missed_fraud_cases

    from telecommunications.fraud_data.transaction_risk
    group by 1, 2, 3, 4
)

select
    metric_quarter,
    metric_quarter_label,
    transaction_state,
    transaction_region,

    autoblocked_cases,
    lag(autoblocked_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_quarter
    ) as autoblocked_cases_last_quarter,

    saved_by_autoblocked_cases,
    lag(saved_by_autoblocked_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_quarter
    ) as saved_by_autoblocked_cases_last_quarter,

    incorrectly_blocked_cases,
    lag(incorrectly_blocked_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_quarter
    ) as incorrectly_blocked_cases_last_quarter,

    lost_by_incorrectly_blocked_cases,
    lag(lost_by_incorrectly_blocked_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_quarter
    ) as lost_by_incorrectly_blocked_cases_last_quarter,

    missed_fraud_cases,
    lag(missed_fraud_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_quarter
    ) as missed_fraud_cases_last_quarter,

    lost_by_missed_fraud_cases,
    lag(lost_by_missed_fraud_cases) over (
        partition by transaction_state, transaction_region
        order by metric_quarter
    ) as lost_by_missed_fraud_cases_last_quarter

from quarterly
order by transaction_state, transaction_region, metric_quarter;
